entity.name: Hans Axelsson
entity.description: Independent developer building open-source AI agent infrastructure — local-first multi-agent orchestration, native AI apps, memory systems, and low-level systems programming. Focused on making agentic AI accessible, composable, and deployable without relying on centralized cloud services.

projects.name: Sovereign Memory
projects.description: Local-first memory system for OpenClaw agent swarms. A persistent, structured memory layer that gives AI agent groups shared context and recall without depending on external services. Built by the agents, for the agents.

projects.name: Syntra
projects.description: Swift AI agent framework built on Vapor — multi-provider LLM integration, tool registry, and context management. A native server-side foundation for building AI agents that can reason, use tools, and manage long-running conversations.

projects.name: llmHub
projects.description: Native macOS/iOS AI agent app with a Brain/Hand/Loop architecture, MCP support, and multi-provider LLM integration. A local-first interface for interacting with and orchestrating AI agents across Apple platforms.

projects.name: Binary Forge
projects.description: Hand-forged x86-64 Linux binaries. No compiler, no libc — just raw ELF, direct syscalls, and machine code elegance. A collection of minimal binaries written directly in assembly to explore the lowest levels of the Linux execution environment.

channels.description: Direct bank transfer available. Please email for details.

plans.name: Infrastructure & API costs
plans.description: Covers server hosting, LLM API credits, and compute resources for developing and testing multi-agent systems.

plans.name: Development support
plans.description: Support ongoing full-time development of open-source AI agent infrastructure — local-first memory, native apps, and multi-agent orchestration tooling.
